name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit positions itself as an Experience Intelligence platform provider differentiated outside the Qualtrics/Medallia ecosystem. Through sub-brands Profusion (data analytics) and Amplify Analytix, they emphasize GenAI-powered customer analytics, predictive modeling, and data-driven CX transformation primarily for financial services and insurance verticals. Their delivery model is EU/India hybrid with proprietary analytics tooling. Thought leadership centers on AI-native experience measurement rather than traditional survey-based VoC.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta operates at the intersection of SAP and Qualtrics, specializing in embedded experience analytics within SAP BTP and S/4HANA environments. Their AI approach focuses on AI agent integration for automated workflow actions triggered by experience data signals. Delivery model is DACH-centric enterprise consulting with deep SAP technical integration capabilities. Thought leadership themes include operationalizing X+O data, AI-driven process automation, and digital experience transformation for manufacturing and financial services enterprises.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics is the dominant Qualtrics partner in the GCC region, specializing in government and public sector citizen experience transformation. Their methodology emphasizes national-scale CX measurement frameworks, digital maturity assessments, and experience governance aligned with Vision 2030 and UAE Smart Government programs. Delivery model is consultancy-led with deep Arabic-language and cultural adaptation capabilities. AI messaging focuses on intelligent survey design and predictive analytics within the Qualtrics platform.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX leverages its massive global research infrastructure to deliver CX measurement, customer loyalty analytics, and experience ROI consulting at enterprise scale. Their methodology is deeply research-driven, combining traditional survey science with behavioral analytics and proprietary loyalty frameworks. They partner with Medallia for platform delivery but maintain platform-agnostic research credibility. Thought leadership centers on consumer trend reports, sector-specific CX benchmarking (retail, financial services, telecom), and econometric approaches to experience investment prioritization.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont is a US-based Qualtrics specialist focused on enterprise experience management program design and optimization, with particular depth in banking and financial services. Their methodology combines Qualtrics platform implementation with strategic CX consulting, emphasizing AI agent deployment, experience orchestration, and closed-loop action systems. Delivery model is hands-on consulting with deep Qualtrics technical expertise. Thought leadership themes include AI-powered VoC, financial services CX transformation, and operationalizing experience data for frontline action.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak is a UK/EU-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner specializing in experience management program implementation and optimization. Their methodology historically emphasizes practical Qualtrics deployment, dashboard design, and program governance for mid-market and enterprise clients. Delivery model is UK-centric consulting with EU reach. Extended content silence makes current AI stance and strategic direction difficult to assess — previous thought leadership focused on Qualtrics platform best practices and XM program maturity frameworks.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap is a Spain/LATAM-based CX and EX consulting firm with a platform-agnostic, methodology-driven approach to customer and employee experience transformation. Their methodology emphasizes journey mapping, experience design, and organizational change management as interconnected disciplines. Delivery model is consultancy-led across Spanish-speaking markets with no visible technology platform dependency. Thought leadership themes include employee experience as CX enabler, journey-centric transformation, talent experience, and cultural change management for large enterprises.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo is an Iberoamerican CX consultancy with Qualtrics-certified operations spanning 15+ Spanish-speaking markets. Their methodology combines strategic CX consulting with Qualtrics platform implementation, emphasizing VoC program design, customer journey optimization, and CX governance frameworks. Delivery model leverages regional presence across Spain, Mexico, Colombia, Chile, and other LATAM markets. Thought leadership focuses on CX strategy, digital experience transformation, and experience measurement maturity for enterprise clients in banking, telecom, and retail sectors.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant is a global digital-native technology company with a Connected Experiences Studio focused on CX design and implementation at enterprise scale. Their AI approach is aggressive and engineering-led, positioning generative AI as a core enabler across all digital transformation engagements. Delivery model is global nearshore/offshore engineering with studios organized by capability domain. CX-specific thought leadership is often subsumed within broader enterprise AI and digital transformation messaging, making it less visible as a standalone CX practice compared to pure-play CX consultancies.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Vocé Group
blog_profile: No verifiable online presence exists for Vocé Group. Unable to develop a meaningful intellectual profile due to complete absence of website, blog, social media, or industry directory listings. This entity may operate under a different name, be pre-launch, or no longer active.

name: Zill Consulting
blog_profile: No verifiable online presence exists for Zill Consulting. Unable to develop a meaningful intellectual profile due to complete absence of website, blog, social media, or industry directory listings. This entity may operate under a different name, be pre-launch, or no longer active.

name: Act XM
blog_profile: No verifiable online presence exists for Act XM. Unable to develop a meaningful intellectual profile due to complete absence of website, blog, social media, or industry directory listings. This entity may operate under a different name, be pre-launch, or no longer active.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy is a Canada/US-based Qualtrics partner specializing in enterprise XM program optimization and AI-driven experience management. Their methodology emphasizes strategic Qualtrics deployment, AI agent configuration, and experience orchestration to drive measurable business outcomes. Delivery model is North American consulting with deep Qualtrics platform expertise. Post-X4 2026 thought leadership has been particularly strong around Qualtrics AI product capabilities, enterprise use cases for AI agents, and ROI-driven XM program design for financial services and public sector clients.
